hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】随着美联储制定新方针，沃什面临多种替代通胀迹象；【FINANCE】Cleveland Fed President Hammack says AI could fuel inflation, rate hikes may be necessary；【AI】惠普公司与 OpenAI 建立 Frontier 战略合作伙伴关系。

items.title: Warsh faces multiple alternative inflation signs as Fed charts new course
items.summary: Warsh has said that inflation is a "choice." The same could also be true of how inflation is measured.
items.title_zh: 随着美联储制定新方针，沃什面临多种替代通胀迹象
items.summary_zh: 沃什曾表示，通货膨胀是一种“选择”。通货膨胀的衡量方式也可能如此。

items.title: Cleveland Fed President Hammack says AI could fuel inflation, rate hikes may be necessary
items.summary: "We've got inflation that's too high, and it's been too high for the past five years," Beth Hammack told CNBC's Sara Eisen.
items.title_zh: Cleveland Fed President Hammack says AI could fuel inflation, rate hikes may be necessary
items.summary_zh: 贝丝·哈马克 (Beth Hammack) 告诉 CNBC 的萨拉·艾森 (Sara Eisen)：“我们的通货膨胀率太高了，过去五年一直太高。”

items.title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
items.summary: HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations.
items.title_zh: 惠普公司与 OpenAI 建立 Frontier 战略合作伙伴关系
items.summary_zh: HP Inc. 扩大其 OpenAI Frontier 合作伙伴关系，在客户体验、软件开发和企业运营领域部署 AI。

items.title: JPMorgan says Strategy's bitcoin sales policy adds 'two-way risk' to crypto markets
items.summary: The bank said Strategy's bitcoin sales policy adds avoidable market uncertainty and should be replaced with equity issuance to build cash reserves.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通表示Strategy的比特币销售政策给加密市场增加了“双向风险”
items.summary_zh: 该银行表示，Strategy的比特币销售政策增加了可避免的市场不确定性，应该以股票发行来取代，以建立现金储备。

items.title: Ondo tokenizes BlackRock’s IVV ETF and Micron stock under US custodial model
items.summary: Ondo Finance launches tokenized BlackRock IVV ETF and Micron shares under SEC-defined custodial model with Ethereum-based settlement.
items.title_zh: Ondo 在美国托管模式下对贝莱德的 IVV ETF 和美光股票进行代币化
items.summary_zh: Ondo Finance 在 SEC 定义的托管模式下推出代币化的 BlackRock IVV ETF 和美光股票，并采用基于以太坊的结算。

items.title: New chip could help tiny robots traverse complex environments
items.summary: Researchers combined an efficient algorithm with dedicated hardware to rapidly generate 3D maps for navigation using minimal memory and power.
items.title_zh: 新芯片可以帮助微型机器人穿越复杂的环境
items.summary_zh: 研究人员将高效算法与专用硬件相结合，使用最少的内存和功耗快速生成用于导航的 3D 地图。

items.title: Iran Prepares to Bury Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, Killed at Iran War’s Outset
items.summary: Long-delayed funeral ceremonies for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, killed during U.S.-Israeli strikes at the war’s outset, are set to begin Friday. For the regime, it is a critical moment to demonstrate that it has endured.
items.title_zh: 伊朗准备埋葬在伊朗战争爆发时被杀的最高领袖阿亚图拉阿里·哈梅内伊
items.summary_zh: 阿亚图拉阿里·哈梅内伊 (Ayatollah Ali Khamenei) 的葬礼推迟已久，他在战争开始时的美以袭击中丧生，将于周五开始。对于该政权来说，这是证明其坚忍不拔的关键时刻。

items.title: U.S. payroll growth slowed sharply in June, with only 57,000 jobs added
items.summary: This morning's data could slow market expectations for a Fed rate hike as soon as this summer or early Fall.
items.title_zh: 美国6月就业增长大幅放缓，仅新增5.7万个就业岗位
items.summary_zh: 今天上午的数据可能会减缓市场对美联储最早在今年夏天或初秋加息的预期。

items.title: Humanity Protocol repositions toward enterprise AI after $36 million hack, founder says
items.summary: Humanity Protocol founder Terence Kwok says the project is pivoting to enterprise AI after a $36 million exploit, with fund recovery odds low.
items.title_zh: 创始人表示，在遭受 3600 万美元黑客攻击后，Humanity Protocol 重新定位为企业人工智能
items.summary_zh: Humanity Protocol 创始人 Terence Kwok 表示，该项目在遭受 3600 万美元的利用后，正在转向企业人工智能，资金回收率很低。

items.title: Bitwise says STRC selloff signals crypto cycle nearing a bottom, not Strategy’s breaking point
items.summary: Bitwise said STRC's volatility reflects a late-cycle leverage unwind, with institutions poised to replace Strategy as bitcoin's biggest buyer.
items.title_zh: Bitwise 表示 STRC 抛售标志着加密周期接近底部，而不是 Strategy 的突破点
items.summary_zh: Bitwise 表示，STRC 的波动反映了周期后期的杠杆解除，机构准备取代 Strategy 成为比特币的最大买家。

items.title: SBI Crypto to shut down mining pool that holds roughly 2% of Bitcoin's hashrate
items.summary: Miners must redirect their hashrate before the July 31 cutoff, as the pool will stop accepting contributions after that date.
items.title_zh: SBI Crypto 将关闭约占比特币算力 2% 的矿池
items.summary_zh: 矿工必须在 7 月 31 日截止日期之前重新调整算力，因为矿池将在该日期之后停止接受贡献。

items.title: Ondo Finance debuts SEC-aligned tokenized stock model with BlackRock ETF, Micron shares
items.summary: Broadridge and transfer agent Oasis Pro underpin a new structure that keeps tokenized securities within existing U.S. market rules, based on the SEC's third-party custodial model.
items.title_zh: Ondo Finance 与 BlackRock ETF、Micron 股票首次推出符合 SEC 的代币化股票模型
items.summary_zh: Broadridge 和转让代理 Oasis Pro 支持一种新的结构，该结构基于 SEC 的第三方托管模式，将代币化证券保持在现有的美国市场规则范围内。

items.title: JPMorgan says Strategy’s bitcoin sale policy introduced ‘avoidable’ risk into crypto markets
items.summary: Strategy introduced "avoidable two-way risk" into crypto markets with its recent bitcoin sale policy, according to JPMorgan analysts.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通表示Strategy的比特币销售政策给加密市场带来了“可避免”的风险
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通分析师表示，该战略通过最近的比特币销售政策，将“可避免的双向风险”引入了加密市场。

items.title: Inaugural Music Technology Research Showcase celebrates work of new graduate program’s initial students
items.summary: Associate Professor Anna Huang delivers the keynote address, “In Search of Human-AI Resonance,” to a capacity crowd.
items.title_zh: 首届音乐技术研究展示会庆祝新研究生项目首批学生的工作
items.summary_zh: 黄安娜副教授向众多观众发表了题为“寻找人类与人工智能的共鸣”的主题演讲。

items.title: Citadel's hedge funds post broad first-half gains, top performing strategy sidesteps quant selloff
items.summary: The hedge fund firm's tactical trading fund, which combines discretionary equity investing with quantitative strategies, climbed 14.3% through the end of June.
items.title_zh: Citadel 的对冲基金上半年大幅上涨，表现最佳的策略避开了量化抛售
items.summary_zh: 这家对冲基金公司的战术交易基金将全权委托股票投资与量化策略相结合，截至 6 月底上涨了 14.3%。

items.title: Prolific tech analyst Dan Ives is exiting Wedbush for a new venture
items.summary: Ives said the new firm will seek to build what he described as a "modern merchant bank."
items.title_zh: 多产科技分析师丹·艾夫斯 (Dan Ives) 即将离开韦德布什 (Wedbush) 前往一家新公司
items.summary_zh: 艾夫斯表示，新公司将寻求建立他所说的“现代商业银行”。

items.title: Inflation peaked in May as energy prices fell in June, Kalshi traders think
items.summary: Speculators on the prediction market platform give less than 30% odds to inflation peaking above 4.2% in 2026.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希交易员认为，随着能源价格在 6 月份下跌，通胀在 5 月份达到顶峰
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台上的投机者认为，2026 年通胀率达到 4.2% 以上峰值的可能性不到 30%。

items.title: Xi touts China Communist Party's global influence in speech marking 105th anniversary
items.summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping spoke Wednesday to commemorate the 105th anniversary of the ruling Communist Party of China.
items.title_zh: 习近平在庆祝建党105周年讲话中宣扬中国共产党的全球影响力
items.summary_zh: 中国国家主席习近平周三发表讲话，纪念中国共产党成立105周年。

items.title: China-linked actors target more than technology as AI competition with U.S. intensifies
items.summary: Cyberattacks from China-based entities are on the rise and not just targeting specific tech, analysts warn, as the U.S. AI race intensifies.
items.title_zh: China-linked actors target more than technology as AI competition with U.S. intensifies
items.summary_zh: Cyberattacks from China-based entities are on the rise and not just targeting specific tech, analysts warn, as the U.S. AI race intensifies.

items.title: Russia Hammers Ukraine’s Capital in Deadly Attacks
items.summary: At least 21 people were killed in Kyiv, the local authorities said. Ukraine’s president had warned that Moscow was preparing a “massive strike” as his country’s forces have hit deeper into Russian territory.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯对乌克兰首都发动致命袭击
items.summary_zh: 当地政府称，基辅至少有 21 人死亡。乌克兰总统警告说，随着乌克兰军队深入俄罗斯领土，莫斯科正在准备发动“大规模袭击”。

items.title: Can the World’s Largest Stadium Explain the Global Economy?
items.summary: High growth rates and surging exports in Vietnam mask deep frustrations in one of Asia’s most ambitious countries.
items.title_zh: 世界上最大的体育场能解释全球经济吗？
items.summary_zh: 越南的高增长率和出口激增掩盖了亚洲最雄心勃勃的国家之一的深深挫败感。

items.title: U.S. Hopes for Investment in Iran Would Break With Decades of History
items.summary: Senior U.S. officials have said Iran would be richly rewarded for changing its stance on the United States. Iran’s leaders have rejected such a bargain in the past.
items.title_zh: 美国对伊朗投资的希望将打破数十年的历史
items.summary_zh: 美国高级官员表示，伊朗如果改变对美国的立场，将会获得丰厚的回报。伊朗领导人过去曾拒绝过这样的交易。

items.title: Bomb Explodes at Damascus Cafe, Killing at Least 6
items.summary: The blast, near the Syrian capital’s main courthouse, underscored the country’s persistent instability as its leaders try to chart a path out of years of dictatorship and war.
items.title_zh: 大马士革咖啡馆发生炸弹爆炸，造成至少 6 人死亡
items.summary_zh: 这起爆炸发生在叙利亚首都主要法院附近，突显了该国持续不稳定的局势，因为该国领导人试图走出多年的独裁和战争之路。

items.title: Dutch and U.K. Governments Apologize for Their Roles in Forced Adoptions
items.summary: In the Netherlands, more than 15,000 children were separated from their mothers from 1956 to 1984, causing “great sorrow and anger,” according to an official report on the practice.
items.title_zh: 荷兰和英国政府为其在强迫收养中所扮演的角色道歉
items.summary_zh: 据有关这种做法的官方报告称，从 1956 年到 1984 年，荷兰有超过 15,000 名儿童与母亲分离，造成“巨大的悲伤和愤怒”。

items.title: Peter Thiel-backed crypto-friendly Erebor Bank eyes $8 billion valuation as deposits nearly quadruple: Bloomberg
items.summary: Erebor Bank, backed by Palmer Luckey and Peter Thiel, is in talks to raise funding at a valuation of at least $8 billion, per Bloomberg.
items.title_zh: Peter Thiel 支持的加密货币 Erebor 银行预计估值将达到 80 亿美元，存款几乎翻了两番：彭博社
items.summary_zh: 据彭博社报道，由 Palmer Luckey 和 Peter Thiel 支持的 Erebor Bank 正在洽谈融资，估值至少为 80 亿美元。

items.title: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
items.summary: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.
items.title_zh: 核心转储流行病学：修复 18 年前的错误
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 工程师使用大规模核心转储分析来调试罕见的基础设施崩溃，发现硬件故障和长期存在的软件错误。

items.title: New York City educators and industry leaders gathered at Google’s offices to shape the future of AI in classrooms.
items.summary: Google, the New York Jobs CEO Council and Urban Assembly hosted an AI summit for 150 education and industry leaders.
items.title_zh: 纽约市的教育工作者和行业领袖齐聚 Google 办公室，共同塑造课堂人工智能的未来。
items.summary_zh: Google、纽约就业首席执行官委员会和 Urban Assembly 为 150 名教育和行业领导者举办了人工智能峰会。

items.title: Our latest Google Finance upgrades, including a new app
items.summary: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app.
items.title_zh: 我们最新的 Google 财经升级，包括新应用
items.summary_zh: 新版 Google 财经即将结束测试版并推出新的 Android 应用程序。

items.title: Securitize tokenizes $295 million of its own stock on Solana and Avalanche amid NYSE debut
items.summary: The newly-public company's shares are the largest issuer-sponsored tokenized stock at launch, aiming to make a point against rival third-party stock token issuers.
items.title_zh: Securitize 在 NYSE 首次亮相时，在 Solana 和 Avalanche 上将价值 2.95 亿美元的自有股票代币化
items.summary_zh: 这家新上市公司的股票是发行人发起的最大的代币化股票，旨在对抗第三方股票代币发行人。

items.title: US Treasury sanctions over 100 ISIS-K crypto addresses that moved over $1.4 million
items.summary: ISIS-K allegedly used its media wing to solicit donations via Tron, Monero, and Bitcoin, highlighting stablecoin issuers' growing role in sanctions enforcement.
items.title_zh: 美国财政部制裁了 100 多个 ISIS-K 加密地址，转移金额超过 140 万美元
items.summary_zh: 据称，ISIS-K 利用其媒体部门通过波场 (Tron)、门罗币 (Monero) 和比特币募集捐款，这凸显了稳定币发行人在制裁执行中日益重要的作用。

items.title: A struggling Nasdaq-listed company that tried to copy Saylor's Bitcoin playbook is completely dumping crypto for AI
items.summary: The Nasdaq-listed Korean media company once lined up $1 billion in financing to buy 10,000 bitcoin. A recent filing confirms its balance is now zero as it pivots to AI infrastructure and fights to stay listed.
items.title_zh: 一家陷入困境的纳斯达克上市公司试图复制塞勒的比特币策略，彻底放弃加密货币，转向人工智能
items.summary_zh: 这家在纳斯达克上市的韩国媒体公司曾排队融资 10 亿美元购买 10,000 个比特币。最近的一份文件证实，随着该公司转向人工智能基础设施并努力保持上市地位，其余额现已为零。

items.title: eToro leads $12.5 million round in onchain perps exchange Extended
items.summary: "The partnership will focus on expanding access to global financial markets through next-generation on-chain infrastructure," eToro said.
items.title_zh: eToro 在链上 Perps 交易所 Extended 中领投 1250 万美元
items.summary_zh: eToro 表示：“此次合作的重点是通过下一代链上基础设施扩大全球金融市场的准入。”

items.title: Irish authorities recover another 500 bitcoins from lost Clifton Collins drug stash
items.summary: Onchain data from Arkham Intelligence now shows wallets tagged "Clifton Collins" holding roughly 4,500 BTC.
items.title_zh: 爱尔兰当局从克利夫顿·柯林斯 (Clifton Collins) 丢失的毒品藏品中又找回了 500 个比特币
items.summary_zh: Arkham Intelligence 的链上数据显示，标记为“Clifton Collins”的钱包持有约 4,500 个 BTC。

items.title: Bitget expands Stock+ platform with US stock options trading
items.summary: Bitget launched U.S. stock options, adding equity derivatives to its Stock+ platform alongside crypto and tokenized stocks.
items.title_zh: Bitget通过美国股票期权交易扩展Stock+平台
items.summary_zh: Bitget 推出了美国股票期权，将股票衍生品与加密货币和代币化股票一起添加到其 Stock+ 平台。

items.title: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
items.summary: Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.
items.title_zh: GeneBench-Pro 简介
items.summary_zh: 隆重推出 GeneBench-Pro，这是一个使用复杂的真实数据集测试基因组学、生物学和科学研究中人工智能性能的新基准。

items.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
items.summary: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.
items.title_zh: 预览 GPT-5.6 Sol：下一代模型
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 预览了 GPT-5.6 Sol，这是一种下一代模型，在编码、科学和网络安全方面具有更强的能力，并配有最先进的安全堆栈。

items.title: How agents are transforming work
items.summary: A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.
items.title_zh: 客服人员如何改变工作方式
items.summary_zh: 一篇新的 OpenAI 研究论文展示了人工智能代理如何改变工作方式，实现更长、更复杂的任务，并提高跨角色的生产力。

items.title: Featuring Every Eval Ever Results on Hugging Face Model Pages
items.title_zh: 在拥抱脸部模型页面上展示所有评估结果

items.title: Accelerating Transformers Fine-Tuning with NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel
items.title_zh: 使用 NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel 加速 Transformer 微调

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in June 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from June 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们在 2026 年 6 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 6 月起最新的 AI 更新。

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026

items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: David Autor named head of the Department of Economics
items.summary: A faculty member since 1999, Autor is a leading researcher in artificial intelligence and the work of the future.
items.title_zh: 大卫·奥托尔被任命为经济系系主任
items.summary_zh: Autor 自 1999 年起担任教员，是人工智能和未来工作领域的领先研究员。

items.title: LLMs help robots understand vague instructions and focus on key details
items.summary: To help robots do chores in places like homes and factories, a new approach from MIT uses one language model to clarify users’ instructions, then another to ignore irrelevant info.
items.title_zh: 法学硕士帮助机器人理解模糊的指令并专注于关键细节
items.summary_zh: To help robots do chores in places like homes and factories, a new approach from MIT uses one language model to clarify users’ instructions, then another to ignore irrelevant info.

items.title: Exploring the societal impacts of AI
items.summary: During the AI and Society Forum, leading MIT researchers examined critical questions about AI’s influence on employment and democracy.
items.title_zh: 探索人工智能的社会影响
items.summary_zh: 在人工智能与社会论坛期间，麻省理工学院的主要研究人员研究了有关人工智能对就业和民主影响的关键问题。

items.title: SpaceX may emerge as ultimate blueprint for new wave of mega-cap IPOs
items.summary: "It would not surprise me at all to see a similar dynamic play out with some of these [IPOs] set to come in the months ahead," the Kathmere Capital CIO says.
items.title_zh: SpaceX可能成为新一波大型IPO的最终蓝图
items.summary_zh: Kathmere Capital 首席信息官表示：“如果在未来几个月内看到其中一些 [IPO] 出现类似的动态，我一点也不感到惊讶。”

items.title: Alibaba-affiliate Ant Group rushes into humanoid robots with a dozen deals in 18 months
items.summary: Ant has led a 500 million yuan ($73.59 million) funding round in humanoid robotics company Zeroth, the start-up announced Thursday.
items.title_zh: 阿里巴巴旗下蚂蚁集团在 18 个月内完成十几笔交易，进军人形机器人领域
items.summary_zh: 仿人机器人公司 Zeroth 周四宣布，蚂蚁金服已领投该公司一轮 5 亿元人民币（7359 万美元）的融资。

items.title: Michael Burry says he's shorting Caterpillar for the first time after it nearly doubled in the AI-driven rally of 2026
items.summary: "Caterpillar jumped out at me," Burry said. "I have never shorted Caterpillar. It has always done great for me on the long side in the past."
items.title_zh: Michael Burry says he's shorting Caterpillar for the first time after it nearly doubled in the AI-driven rally of 2026
items.summary_zh: “毛毛虫向我扑来，”伯里说。 "I have never shorted Caterpillar. It has always done great for me on the long side in the past."

items.title: Venezuela quake survivor pulled out alive after eight days

items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉地震幸存者八天后生还

items.title: 'Most massive' Russian attack on Kyiv kills at least 27

items.summary_zh: 最新的攻击在首都部署了最多数量的武器，打击了大范围的地点。

items.summary_zh: 这位在车祸中丧生的 66 岁老人感到焦虑，并在日记中提到“结束生命”。

items.summary: Rabies infections are rare in Canada. There have been 28 human deaths due to rabies in the country since 1924.
